name: genslides
description: HTML-mockup-first → pptxgenjs → validate workflow for crafting on-brand consulting / bid / executive slides one page at a time. Default brand standard: KPMG (navy 00338D / blue 0091DA / 微软雅黑 / 「主题：阐述」titles), fully configurable in config/theme.json. Composes the pptx and frontend-design skills; enforces mode-alignment, HTML sign-off, OOXML validation, and fresh-eyes QA gates.
